sources.name: CEGA — Center for Effective Global Action

items.title: Geospatial Analysis for Development
items.description: CEGA's landing page for the Geo4Dev Initiative, framing geo4.dev as the hub for crowd-sourced research, training, and datasets with NLT, 3ie, and the World Bank as collaborators.

items.title: Introducing CEGA's Geo4Dev Tutorials
items.description: Announces a set of Geo4Dev tutorials produced by CEGA with NLT, 3ie, and other partners.

items.title: Unlocking the Potential of Geospatial Analytics for Global Development
items.description: Describes the expansion of the annual Geo4Dev conference into a standing initiative, supported in part by NLT.

items.title: Harnessing Big Data To Solve Big Problems
items.description: Overview of the Geo4Dev Initiative run by CEGA with NLT and the World Bank.

items.title: Development Engineering Journal: Special Issue on Geospatial Analysis for Development
items.description: Call for submissions tied to the Geo4Dev Symposium and Workshop.

items.title: Geo4Dev 2018 Recap: How Geospatial Data Can Aid Humanitarian Response
items.description: Recap of the 2018 event focused on geospatial data for disaster and humanitarian use.

items.title: Geo4Dev 2018 Conference Addresses Innovative Geospatial Analysis for Disaster Response
items.description: News piece on the November 2018 convening of geospatial experts.

items.title: Geo4Dev 2017 Symposium & Workshop
items.description: Event page for the 2017 Geo4Dev symposium and workshop.

items.title: Geo4Dev 2018
items.description: Event page for the 2018 Geo4Dev convening.

items.description: Event page for the 2020 Geo4Dev symposium and workshop.

items.title: Geo4Dev Summer 2022 Workshop Series
items.description: Event page for the summer 2022 workshop series.

items.description: Event page for the June 2020 summer workshop.

items.title: Geo4Dev Workshop: Crop Yield Mapping Using Satellite Data
items.description: Hands-on workshop on crop-yield mapping with satellite imagery.

items.title: Geo4Dev DC Workshop: Woody Cover Estimation in Brazil
items.description: DC workshop on woody-cover estimation in Brazil.

items.title: Introduction to Open Data and Tools — Daynan Crull (NLT)
items.description: Geo4Dev 2020 session introducing open data and tools, presented by NLT's Daynan Crull.

items.title: Using Satellite Imagery to Predict Income & Population — Gordon Hanson
items.description: Geo4Dev 2020 talk on predicting income and population change from satellite imagery.

items.title: Publishing in Development Engineering — Berber Kramer
items.description: Geo4Dev 2020 session on publishing in the Development Engineering journal.

items.title: Annual Cycling Patterns of Nighttime Lights in India — Chris Elvidge
items.description: Geo4Dev 2020 talk exploring annual cycles in India's nighttime lights.

items.title: Opening Remarks — Natasha Beale (Geo4Dev 2018)
items.description: Opening remarks from the Geo4Dev 2018 convening.

items.title: FEMA's Hurricane Incident Journal — Madeline Jones (NLT)
items.description: Geo4Dev 2018 talk on FEMA's Hurricane Incident Journal, presented by NLT's Madeline Jones.

items.title: 3rd Annual Geo4Dev Symposium & Workshop
items.description: 3ie's event page for the online symposium hosted by CEGA's Geo4Dev Initiative.

items.title: Geo4Dev Workshop: Woody Cover Estimation in Brazil using Synthetic Aperture Radar
items.description: Workshop listing that frames Geo4Dev as a joint initiative of CEGA, NLT, and 3ie.

items.title: Nine Common Challenges Geospatial Analysis Can Solve
items.description: 3ie blog on practical applications of geospatial and remotely-sensed data, with real-world case studies.

items.title: Open Technical Questions in Geospatial Impact Evaluations
items.description: Blog from the GeoField community on open challenges in geospatial impact evaluation.

items.title: Geospatial Data for Measuring Vegetation Impact on Agricultural Productivity
items.description: Blog on geospatial impact evaluation methods applied to agriculture.

items.title: Despite the Hype, Do Not Expect Big Data to Replace Traditional Surveys Anytime Soon
items.description: Blog referencing the Geo4Dev Initiative as a hub for geospatial targeting research.

items.title: Geospatial Analysis in Impact Evaluation (3ie–NLT flyer)
items.description: A joint 3ie–NLT flyer on applying geospatial data to impact evaluation.

items.title: Innovations in Data for Impact Evaluation
items.description: 3ie program page covering geospatial analysis, machine learning, and related data methods.

items.title: Training Initiative for Evidence-Informed Policy
items.description: 3ie capacity-building program page.

items.title: Resources
items.description: 3ie resources page noting a Geo4Dev-developed platform consolidating literature and tools on remote sensing.

items.title: Geo4Dev: Understanding Developing Countries with Innovative Geospatial Data and Tools
items.description: NLT blog post introducing Geo4Dev and NLT's role in the initiative.

items.title: Geospatial & Remote Sensing
items.description: NLT's capabilities page, describing Geo4Dev as a collaboration between NLT, CEGA, and partners.

items.title: NLT Blog
items.description: NLT's main blog index — useful for monitoring future Geo4Dev-related posts.

items.title: Geo4Dev: Making Geospatial Data and Tools More Accessible (AiThority)
items.description: Press coverage of the Geo4Dev launch symposium naming CEGA, NLT, and 3ie as partners.

items.description: Geospatial-industry coverage of the initiative hosted by CEGA with NLT and partners.

items.description: CEGA's Medium article on the Geo4Dev Initiative with NLT and the World Bank.

items.description: Medium version of CEGA's tutorials announcement.

items.description: CGD publication referencing Geo4Dev (led by CEGA and NLT) and 3ie's Big Data Systematic Map.
